coarse_interaction_endpoint.contract: finite-stratum uniformly sampled absolute interaction aggregate; no entropy estimator or continuum claim
coarse_interaction_endpoint.warning: normal-approximation interval accounts only for within-stratum Monte Carlo variance; it is not a certified enclosure

coarse_interaction_initial.contract: finite-stratum uniformly sampled absolute interaction aggregate; no entropy estimator or continuum claim
coarse_interaction_initial.warning: normal-approximation interval accounts only for within-stratum Monte Carlo variance; it is not a certified enclosure

finite_galerkin_evolution.contract: finite-Galerkin normalized-profile parabolic-window receipt; no profile-uniform inference
finite_galerkin_evolution.switching_warning: moving-packet rates are evaluated in a re-centred window. Frozen-initial-packet rates are the promotion authority; checkpoint_recentering_jump_sum is diagnostic only and is not an exact all-step switching balance.

quotient_slice.amplitude_fixed: finite dyadic H^(1/2) mass exactly normalised
quotient_slice.dyadic_scale_status: target shell declared; literal scale copies are not interpreted as new profile directions
quotient_slice.perturbation_contract: state-anchored finite local deformation followed by exact finite critical-mass normalisation; admissibility is checked after perturbation
quotient_slice.warning: critical mass and chi cannot both be imposed by a single scalar rescaling at fixed carrier scale; chi is matched by profile/phase selection

stratified_interaction_measure.contract: finite-stratum uniformly sampled absolute interaction aggregate; no entropy estimator or continuum claim
stratified_interaction_measure.warning: normal-approximation interval accounts only for within-stratum Monte Carlo variance; it is not a certified enclosure
